content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 7, 0), (3, 6, 2), (0, 5, 3), (6, 7, 5), (4, 8, 6), (4, 9, 6), (3, 4, 7), (7, 8, 7), (3, 8, 8), (1, 5, 9), (5, 9, 9), (1, 9, 11), (1, 2, 15), (4, 7, 16), (5, 8, 16), (4, 5, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 7 exactly at time 7.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (3, 7, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 6, 2) has node 3 and time 2. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 5, 3) has node 0 and time 3. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 7, 5) has node 6 and time 5. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (4, 8, 6) has node 4 and time 6. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 9, 6) has node 4 and time 6. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 4, 7) has node 3 and time 7. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (7, 8, 7) has node 7 and time 7. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 8, 8) has node 3 and time 8. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 5, 9) has node 1 and time 9. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 9, 9) has node 5 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 9, 11) has node 1 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 2, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (4, 7, 16) has node 4 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 8, 16) has node 5 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 5, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Add node 5.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 7 exactly at time 7.

Answer: [7, 8, 5, 9]
